calculator.title: Tax calculator for selling an apartment in Ukraine
calculator.description: Sale price, sale order in the calendar year, PIT, military levy, stamp duty, notary — net amount in USD.
calculator.metaTitle: Tax calculator for selling an apartment in Ukraine
calculator.subtitle: How much remains after taxes and fees in Ukraine before legalizing funds in Poland

inputs.sharedHint: Full calculation of the seller’s costs in Ukraine; the net result can be carried over to the Poland legalization guide.
inputs.saleOrderLabel: Residential property sales in the calendar year
inputs.saleOrderSecondNote: 2nd sale: 5% PIT + 5% military levy on the contract price — even if ownership exceeds 3 years (Tax Code art. 172).
inputs.tenureDisabledNote: Ownership period is counted only for the 1st sale in the year.
inputs.purchasePriceHint: For 3rd+ sale: 18% PIT on profit (sale − purchase). If omitted — the full sale price is used for the estimate.
inputs.netHint: After all seller costs in UA (see breakdown above) — basis for method 1 or 2.

result.label: Costs when selling in Ukraine
result.buyerNote: Paid separately by the buyer (does not reduce your net amount):
result.footnote: Tax Code art. 172: 1st (>3 yrs) — 0%/0%; 1st (<3 yrs) — 5%+5%; 2nd — 5%+5%; 3rd+ — 18% on profit + 5% military. Notary {{notaryUah}} UAH + certificates {{docsUah}} UAH at NBU rate.
